summary: Complete testing of Stripe bug fix and Enterprise Portal. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Verified: SOS device order creates 'pending_payment' status, returns Stripe checkout_url, devices NOT created before payment. Enterprise Portal admin login works. Google Play user login works.
verified_features: API /api/sos-device/order - Creates order with status 'pending_payment' - WORKING
API /api/sos-device/order - Does NOT create devices before payment confirmation - WORKING (Bug Fix Verified)
API /api/sos-device/order/{order_id}/status - Returns order status and payment_status - WORKING
API /api/sos-device/webhook/stripe - Endpoint exists and accepts requests - WORKING
API /api/enterprise/auth/login - Admin login with admin@manoprotect.com / Admin2026! - WORKING
API /api/enterprise/dashboard/stats - Returns KPIs (employees, clients, SOS, alerts, revenue) - WORKING
API /api/enterprise/employees - Lists employees with pagination - WORKING
API /api/enterprise/clients - Lists clients with pagination - WORKING
API /api/auth/login - Google Play user review@manoprotect.com / 20142026 - WORKING
Enterprise Portal Login UI - /enterprise/login page functional - WORKING
Enterprise Portal Dashboard - Shows KPIs, SOS alerts, security alerts - WORKING
Enterprise Portal Navigation - All menu items visible (Dashboard, Empleados, Clientes, SOS, Alerts, Orders, Cash Flow, Audit) - WORKING
SOS Device Order Page - Shows GRATIS device + 4.95€ shipping - WORKING
SOS Device Order Page - Color selection functional - WORKING
User Dashboard - Loads after login with correct user greeting - WORKING

stripe_bug_fix_verification.issue: Orders were being created without verifying payment, devices created immediately
behavior_after_fix: Order returns checkout_url pointing to stripe.com
Devices are NOT created until webhook confirms payment
Order status can be checked via /api/sos-device/order/{order_id}/status

critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration properly creates pending orders and redirects to checkout
Webhook endpoint exists for payment confirmation
Enterprise Portal has proper role-based access control
All tested APIs return proper response structures
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with prefix 'TEST_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe bug fix verified - orders now created with 'pending_payment' status. Devices only created after webhook confirmation. Enterprise Portal at /enterprise/login with admin@manoprotect.com works. Google Play user review@manoprotect.com works. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_38.py covers all required features.
